sources.title: BigCloneBench and clone-evaluation lineage
authors: UNKNOWN - select and verify primary sources before implementation
implementation_notes: Use repository-level split enforcement and adjudicated labels.
Keep clone-detection benchmarks separate from pattern-family claim validation.

sources.title: Recent caution on BigCloneBench semantic-clone suitability
authors: UNKNOWN - verify from primary source before implementation
implementation_notes: Do not treat benchmark inclusion as proof of semantic equivalence.
Report annotation protocol, annotator agreement, and abstention rates.
